steps.text: Produce the ground-truth workflow graph for the document.
Incorporate true, comprehensive, and stable isotope dilution for quantifying target compounds.
Change the method quality control from prescriptive format to performance-based approach.
Expand the list of target compounds to include PAH and PCB.
Ensure consistent implementation of Method 23 across emissions sources.
Verify that laboratory analysis teams demonstrate ability to generate acceptable results.
Ensure working knowledge of EPA Methods 1 through 5 when applying Method 23.
Develop a strict laboratory safety program for handling target compounds.
Complete background assessment of field train proof blank and LMB.
Perform initial demonstration of capability (IDC) to establish a valid baseline for laboratory performance.
Ensure ongoing quality control by analyzing Quality Control Samples (QCS).
Monitor and document instrument stability during analysis with lock-mass ions.
Conduct pre-extraction and pre-analysis standard recovery checks.

constraints.text: This method includes acceptability criteria for assessing sampling and analytical procedures.
Laboratory is responsible for maintaining a current awareness file of OSHA regulations regarding the safe handling of chemicals.
